old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.2.1","title":"Fail link init closed on entropy error","description":"Change lichen_link_init to obtain entropy before context mutation, return -EIO on Zephyr/POSIX/unsupported-platform failure, document the contract, and add a deterministic host POSIX fault-injection CTest proving success mapping and failure non-mutation.","acceptance_criteria":"lichen_link_init returns -EIO without modifying context when entropy fails; successful fixed entropy maps to epoch 128+(byte\u00260x7f); header documents errors; host POSIX fault test passes; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:13:56.084761Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T02:13:56.084761Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.2.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:13:56.207596Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: {"notes":"Completed in d73e48827. lichen_link_init now acquires entropy before context/mutex mutation and returns -EIO on all entropy failures; unsupported key generation also fails at runtime. Added strict-C11 host getentropy fault oracle wired into interop CI. Default and Release CTests pass; three final reviews found no issues. Linux CI remains pending."}
